description: The Bottoms Gang was an American street gang based in St. Louis, Missouri, active from around 1905 to 1917. Founded by Frank Hussey and Anthony Foley, the gang engaged in voter intimidation, armed robbery, assault, illegal lottery, and murder. Its members were primarily Irish-American, and the gang was known for extreme violence and feuding with the larger Egan's Rats gang and the St. Louis Police Department. The gang ceased to exist by the time the United States entered World War I.
